sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41891" key="e)poxeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐποχεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (ἐπέχὠ</foreign> <sense id="n41891.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">brake,</tr_> prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐποχλεύς</foreign> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
